title: Hopia obtusa

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating liver and digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The bioactive constituents of Hopia obtusa include flavonoids, saponins, and coumarins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine and Western herbalism, Hopia obtusa is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into formulas to promote liver health and detoxification.
